subcodes.first_line: Man is bewildered, inasmuch as all the people of the Bayán have witnessed and heard the falsehoods and calumnies of the followers of the Qur'an before them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان متحیر است چه که جمیع اهل بیان کذب و مفتریات قبل اهل فرقانرا دیده و شنیده‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
